headline: Walmart Extends Health Reach With Nella Kit And Teladoc Partnership
summary: Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT) has launched the Nella Comfort Kit, a new women's health product, across its stores and online in the US. The company is integrating Teladoc virtual urgent care, dermatology, and nutrition services into its Better Care Services platform. These moves expand Walmart's healthcare access offering alongside its existing retail and pharmacy footprint. For investors watching how retailers broaden their role in healthcare, Walmart is pushing further into services that sit...

headline: ICE enforcement surge led to 668,000 job losses, Brookings says
summary: Investing.com -- The Trump administration’s immigration enforcement surge across major U.S. cities last year resulted in an estimated 668,000 job losses and weighed on local economic activity, according to a report released by the Brookings Institution and cited by Bloomberg on Friday.
